heading: Government corporation control provisions applicable
label: 290h–6 Government corporation control provisions applicable
text: The Foundation shall be subject to the provisions of chapter 91 of title 31 applicable to wholly owned Government corporations.
notes: Codification“The provisions of chapter 91 of title 31 applicable to wholly owned Government corporations” substituted in text for “title I of the Government Corporation Control Act [ et seq.]” on authority of , , , the first section of which enacted Title 31, Money and Finance.31 U.S.C. 846Pub. L. 97–258, § 4(b)96 Stat. 1067Sept. 13, 1982
